title: springy venezuelan rice pilaf
description: A winey, spring-inspired venezuelan dish featuring brown rice and a savory miso marinate, perfect for no-onion-no-garlic diets.

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: white or yellow miso works best

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a mild, light olive oil

ingredients.name: saffron threads
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds a bright, sunny flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the miso paste and stir until dissolved.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Add the brown rice and stir to coat the rice with the miso marinade.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and fluffy.
Stir in the vinegar and black pepper to taste.
If using saffron threads, stir them in for an additional minute to let the flavor infuse.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the springy rice pilaf hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days or freeze for up to 2 months
